data.content: Implemented and pushed commit d84c52ca646d on branch codex/web-ui-diagnostics-redo from worktree /Users/cartine/foolery-diag-impl. Added the gated runtime diagnostics UI, diagnostics route rename with Runtime and Leases tabs, client/server perf event plumbing, diagnostics ingest endpoint, server timing headers for key routes, profiler wrappers, user timing marks, regression harness at scripts/collect-perf-baseline.mjs, and unit tests for perf-events, server-timing, and client-perf. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Captured a local baseline artifact at work/perf-baselines/1774801699727-baseline.json. Ready for implementation review; merge to main is deferred to a later workflow step.
